strengths: Exceeds minimum experience requirement by 4 years with deep technical versatility across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains
Demonstrates entrepreneurial capability through GISCollective founding and ongoing maintenance with real-world adoption (Green Map)
Strong software craftsmanship foundation with proven ability to teach and inspire through public workshops, talks, and technical leadership
concerns: Minimal demonstrated AI/ML expertise—current role (April 2025) marks first significant AI exposure; lacks portfolio of shipped AI products or platforms
No advanced degree in AI-related field (only BS Computer Science)—key preferred qualification for director-level AI strategy position
Career pattern reflects IC technical execution rather than director-level strategic leadership, customer advisory roles, or cloud/AI platform vision-setting
response.justification: Bogdan possesses strong foundational qualifications—nearly 20 years of diverse engineering experience and demonstrated builder mentality through multiple technical projects. However, the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' His AI exposure is recent and limited to developer infrastructure (MCP frameworks), with no prior AI platform work or formal AI-focused education. While his current re:cinq position suggests potential for developing specialized AI expertise, the candidate currently lacks the depth of demonstrated AI product experience expected at principal engineer level.
